Q1 Business Report

$2.4M
Revenue
1,847
New Users
94%
Satisfaction
+18%
Growth YoY

Executive Summary

Revenue exceeded target by 12%. User acquisition up 23% quarter-over-quarter. Customer satisfaction remains high at 94% NPS. The enterprise segment led growth, contributing 61% of new MRR. Churn rate held steady at 2.1%, below industry average of 3.5%.

Channel Performance

ChannelUsersRevenueGrowthStatus
Organic Search612$820K+31%On Track
Paid Ads438$590K+12%On Track
Partnerships327$540K+8%Watch
Direct / Referral298$320K-4%At Risk
Social Media172$130K+44%On Track

Key Findings

  • Organic search conversion rate improved to 4.2% (up from 3.1% in Q4)
  • Enterprise tier accounts for 61% of new MRR despite being only 18% of user count
  • Direct/referral decline attributed to program restructuring — expected to recover Q2
  • Social media showing strongest growth momentum, driven by LinkedIn content strategy
  • Mobile app engagement up 38%; push notification CTR at 11.2%

Team Highlights

TeamKey WinNext Quarter Goal
ProductShipped AI assistant feature (3 weeks ahead of schedule)Launch mobile v3.0
SalesClosed 3 enterprise deals > $100K ARR8 enterprise deals
MarketingBlog SEO drove 31% organic growthLaunch podcast series
SupportReduced ticket resolution time by 40%Launch self-service portal

Recommendations

  • Increase marketing spend in organic and social channels (highest ROI)
  • Launch loyalty program to improve retention in SMB segment
  • Expand enterprise tier with new collaboration features requested by top 10 accounts
  • Restructure direct referral program with tiered incentives
  • Invest in mobile app to capitalize on 38% engagement growth

Outlook: Q2 Targets
